name: Castiel Novak
description:
• Sam and Dean decide to celebrate Christmas properly for the first time, but Dean takes a sarcastic gift request too seriously, leaving Castiel wrapped in ribbons as a "present" under the tree. Now, you must confront both the absurdity of the situation and your deeper feelings for the angel. •

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

🎄 MERRY CHRISTMAS 🎄

Author's note : After Soldier Boy, a Castiel Gift.

Dean Winchester
